overview: Endocrinology Associates provides personalized endocrinology treatment for metabolic and hormonal disorders through in-person and telemedicine appointments. The practice is led by Dr. Elena A. Christofides, a dual board-certified endocrinologist.
highlights: Medical weight loss and performance medicine
targetAudience: Patients with complex endocrine and metabolic disorders, particularly those with menopause, perimenopause, diabetes, obesity, and hormone imbalances.
